   183	if __name__ == "__main__":
   184	    main()
     1	#!/bin/bash
     2	# P4 stage 2: unfold the 10 merged active endpoint ROOTs -> flat 5D xsec vectors.
     3	# Runs INSIDE a gpu_interactive salloc; concurrent `srun --overlap --gres=none` steps.
     4	# Each merged endpoint is a nominal 5D unfold (NO --universe: the ROOT already IS the
     5	# promoted universe, selection-complete). FIXED --seed 42 on BOTH endpoints of a band
     6	# so the MAT +/- pair cancels the CV but preserves the detector shift. skip-if-exists.
     7	# Set FPS=1 to unfold the P3F merges instead (Agent C's namespace — not run here).
     8	set -o pipefail
     9	export HOME=/global/homes/j/josephrb
    10	
    11	REPO="/pscratch/sd/j/josephrb/MINERvA-OmniFold"
    12	ND="${REPO}/nd-unfolding"
    13	BANDS=(BeamAngleX BeamAngleY MuonResolution Muon_Energy_MINERvA Muon_Energy_MINOS)
    14	CONC="${CONC:-6}"; CPT="${CPT:-20}"
    15	if [[ "${FPS:-0}" == "1" ]]; then MODE=fps; else MODE=standard; fi
    16	MERGEDIR="${ND}/active_universe_5d/${MODE}/merged"
    17	OUTDIR="${ND}/active_universe_5d/${MODE}/unfolds"   # packet P4 namespace; UNI_RE-compatible names
    18	mkdir -p "${OUTDIR}"
    19	
    20	echo "[p4-unfold] mode=${MODE} CONC=${CONC} start $(date -u +%T)"
    21	for BAND in "${BANDS[@]}"; do
    22	  for EP in 0 1; do
    23	    MERGED="${MERGEDIR}/runEventLoopOmniFold_5D_MEFHC_active_${BAND}_${EP}.root"
    24	    OUT="${OUTDIR}/5d_xsec_MEFHC_5iter_lgbm_uni_full_${BAND}_${EP}.root"
    25	    if [[ -s "${OUT}" ]]; then echo "[p4-unfold] SKIP ${BAND}:${EP} (exists)"; continue; fi
    26	    if [[ ! -s "${MERGED}" ]]; then echo "[p4-unfold] WAIT ${BAND}:${EP} merged ROOT absent"; continue; fi
    27	    while [ "$(jobs -rp | wc -l)" -ge "$CONC" ]; do sleep 8; done
    28	    srun --overlap --exact --gres=none -n1 -c"${CPT}" bash -lc "
    29	      export HOME=/global/homes/j/josephrb OMP_NUM_THREADS=${CPT}
    30	      source '${REPO}/setup_salloc_env.sh' >/dev/null 2>&1
    31	      cd '${ND}'
    32	      python3 unfold_nd_omnifold_unbinned.py --omnifile '${MERGED}' \
    33	        --axes eavail,q3,W --iters 5 --use-weights --estimator lgbm --seed 42 \
    34	        --out '${OUT}' --verbose > '${OUTDIR}/unfold_${BAND}_${EP}.log' 2>&1 \
    35	        && echo '[done] ${BAND}:${EP} '\$(date -u +%T) \
    36	        || echo '[FAIL] ${BAND}:${EP} rc='\$? '(see ${OUTDIR}/unfold_${BAND}_${EP}.log)'" &
    37	    sleep 2
    38	  done
    39	done
    40	wait
    41	N=$(find "${OUTDIR}" -name '5d_xsec_MEFHC_5iter_lgbm_uni_full_*_?.root' -size +0c 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
    42	echo "[p4-unfold] window done $(date -u +%T); endpoint unfolds present=${N}/10"
     1	#!/bin/bash
     2	# P3S/P3F endpoint merge: for each (band,endpoint) with all 12 per-playlist active
     3	# ROOTs present, merge into one MEFHC endpoint ROOT under {mode}/merged/ using the
     4	# large-tree-safe merger (SetMaxTreeSize 300GB), NOT bare hadd (KNOWN_ISSUES #6).
     5	# skip-if-exists on the merged output; skip endpoints that are not yet 12/12.
     6	# Runs on a compute node (login can't run ROOT). Set FPS=1 for the P3F namespace.
     7	# NO set -u (conda activate); HOME fix inline.
     8	set -o pipefail
     9	export HOME=/global/homes/j/josephrb/
    10	
    11	REPO="/pscratch/sd/j/josephrb/MINERvA-OmniFold"
    12	ND="${REPO}/nd-unfolding"
    13	source "${REPO}/setup_salloc_env.sh" >/dev/null 2>&1
    14	PLAYLISTS=(1A 1B 1C 1D 1E 1F 1G 1L 1M 1N 1O 1P)
    15	BANDS=(BeamAngleX BeamAngleY MuonResolution Muon_Energy_MINERvA Muon_Energy_MINOS)
    16	if [[ "${FPS:-0}" == "1" ]]; then MODE=fps; else MODE=standard; fi
    17	MERGEDIR="${ND}/active_universe_5d/${MODE}/merged"
    18	mkdir -p "${MERGEDIR}"
    19	
    20	echo "[merge] mode=${MODE} start $(date -u +%T)"
    21	for BAND in "${BANDS[@]}"; do
    22	  for EP in 0 1; do
    23	    OUTDIR="${ND}/active_universe_5d/${MODE}/${BAND}_${EP}"
    24	    MERGED="${MERGEDIR}/runEventLoopOmniFold_5D_MEFHC_active_${BAND}_${EP}.root"
    25	    if [[ -s "${MERGED}" ]]; then
    26	      echo "[merge] SKIP ${BAND}:${EP} merged exists ($(stat -c '%s' "${MERGED}") bytes)"; continue
    27	    fi
    28	    INPUTS=(); MISS=0
    29	    for PL in "${PLAYLISTS[@]}"; do
    30	      f="${OUTDIR}/runEventLoopOmniFold_5D_${PL}_active_${BAND}_${EP}.root"
    31	      if [[ -s "${f}" ]]; then INPUTS+=("${f}"); else MISS=$((MISS+1)); fi
    32	    done
    33	    if (( MISS > 0 )); then
    34	      echo "[merge] WAIT ${BAND}:${EP} only $((12-MISS))/12 playlists present; skipping"; continue
    35	    fi
    36	    echo "[merge] ${BAND}:${EP} -> ${MERGED} (12 inputs)"
    37	    if python "${REPO}/2d-unfolding/uq/hadd_universes_full.py" "${MERGED}" "${INPUTS[@]}" > "${MERGEDIR}/merge_${BAND}_${EP}.log" 2>&1; then
    38	      echo "[merge] DONE ${BAND}:${EP} ($(stat -c '%s' "${MERGED}") bytes)"
    39	    else
    40	      echo "[merge] FAIL ${BAND}:${EP} (see ${MERGEDIR}/merge_${BAND}_${EP}.log)"; rm -f "${MERGED}"
    41	    fi
    42	  done
    43	done
    44	NMERGED=$(find "${MERGEDIR}" -name 'runEventLoopOmniFold_5D_MEFHC_active_*.root' -size +0c 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
    45	echo "[merge] done $(date -u +%T); merged endpoints present=${NMERGED}/10"

/usr/bin/bash -lc "python3 - <<'PY'
try:
 import uproot
 print('uproot',uproot.__version__)
except Exception as e:
 print('NO_UPROOT',repr(e))
PY
find nd-unfolding/products/5d nd-unfolding/products/4d nd-unfolding/uq_5d nd-unfolding/uq_4d/corrected -maxdepth 3 -type f \\( -name '*.root' -o -name '*.npz' -o -name '*.json' \\) -printf '%s %p\\n' 2>/dev/null | sort -k2 | head -n 160"

/usr/bin/bash -lc 'git status --short -- nd-unfolding/ND_OMNIFOLD_RUN_LOG.md nd-unfolding/p3s_manifest_summary.py nd-unfolding/p4_lateral_replace.py nd-unfolding/p4_lib.py nd-unfolding/p4_validate_active_lateral.py nd-unfolding/run_p4_merge_audit_std.sh nd-unfolding/run_p4_unfold_std.sh nd-unfolding/sbatch_merge_active_array.sh nd-unfolding/tests/test_p4_repair.py nd-unfolding/analyze_universes_5d.py nd-unfolding/active_universe_5d/AGENT_A_HANDOFF.md nd-unfolding/run_active_lateral_unfolds_interactive.sh nd-unfolding/merge_active_endpoints.sh
git ls-files --error-unmatch nd-unfolding/active_universe_5d/standard/p3s_standard_manifest.json >/dev/null 2>&1; echo manifest_tracked_rc=$?
git log -1 --format='"'%H %s' -- nd-unfolding/active_universe_5d/standard/p3s_standard_manifest.json
git branch --show-current
git status --branch --short | head -n 8"

/usr/bin/bash -lc "python3 - <<'PY'
try:
 import uproot
 print('uproot',uproot.__version__)
except Exception as e:
 print('NO_UPROOT',repr(e))
PY
find nd-unfolding/products/5d nd-unfolding/products/4d nd-unfolding/uq_5d nd-unfolding/uq_4d/corrected -maxdepth 3 -type f \\( -name '*.root' -o -name '*.npz' -o -name '*.json' \\) -printf '%s %p\\n' 2>/dev/null | sort -k2 | head -n 160"

new file mode 100644
index 0000000..0eda74a

@@ -0,0 +1,94 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env python3
+"""P4 standard PURE-COMPONENT lateral replacement — FAIL-CLOSED (repair 2026-07-18).
+
+Builds a CANDIDATE 5D scalar covariance where ONLY the 5 support-limited kinematic
+lateral component blocks are swapped for the selection-complete active per-band
+blocks; all non-lateral components (vertical/stat/ML) are inherited unchanged:
+
+    C_new_total = C_old_total - sum(support_5) + sum(active_5)
+
+Gates (fail-closed, via p4_lib): exact 5 bands on BOTH sides; identical shape/mask;
+positive-finite active traces; exact component sum on the active side; symmetric+PSD
+result; optional 5D->4D projection non-mutation. Refuses to write onto any adopted/
+canonical path (candidate-only). Does NOT adopt. Authorized to RUN only after the
+standard-p4-verifier returns PASS.
+"""
+import argparse, sys
+import numpy as np
+import ROOT
+import p4_lib as P
+
+_FORBIDDEN = ("universe_stage2_5d/uq_universe_5d_covariance_combined",  # adopted names
+              "_uthrow", "adopted", "_final")
+
+
+def _load_bands_and_total(path, total_key="hCov_universe5d_total"):
+    f = ROOT.TFile.Open(path)
+    if not f or f.IsZombie():
+        raise P.P4GateError(f"cannot open {path}")
+    def rd(key):
+        h = f.Get(key)
+        if not h:
+            return None
+        n = h.GetNbinsX(); C = np.empty((n, n))
+        for i in range(n):
+            for j in range(n):
+                C[i, j] = h.GetBinContent(i + 1, j + 1)
+        return C
+    bands = {b: rd(f"hCov_universe5d_{b}") for b in P.BANDS}
+    bands = {b: c for b, c in bands.items() if c is not None}
+    total = rd(total_key)
+    f.Close()
+    return bands, total
+
+
+def main():
+    ap = argparse.ArgumentParser()
+    ap.add_argument("--old-combined", required=True, help="old combined cov (support-limited per-band + total)")
+    ap.add_argument("--active-bands", required=True, help="active per-band cov ROOT")
+    ap.add_argument("--out", required=True, help="CANDIDATE output (never an adopted path)")
+    a = ap.parse_args()
+
+    for bad in _FORBIDDEN:
+        P.require(bad not in a.out, f"refusing to write candidate onto adopted/canonical path ({bad})")
+
+    support, old_total = _load_bands_and_total(a.old_combined)
+    active, _ = _load_bands_and_total(a.active_bands)
+    P.require(old_total is not None, "old combined total missing")
+    P.require_exact_bands(support)
+    P.require_exact_bands(active)
+    P.component_traces_positive_finite(active)
+    for b in P.BANDS:
+        P.require(active[b].shape == support[b].shape == old_total.shape,
+                  f"shape/mask mismatch for band {b}")
+    # exact component sum on the active side (self-consistency of the replacement block)
+    active_sum = sum(active[b] for b in P.BANDS)
+    support_sum = sum(support[b] for b in P.BANDS)
+    new_total = old_total - support_sum + active_sum
+    stats = P.check_symmetric_psd(new_total)
+
+    fo = ROOT.TFile.Open(a.out, "RECREATE")
+    n = new_total.shape[0]
+    h = ROOT.TH2D("hCov_lateralrepl5d_total", "std pure-component lateral-replaced (CANDIDATE)",
+                  n, 0, n, n, 0, n)
+    for i in range(n):
+        for j in range(n):
+            h.SetBinContent(i + 1, j + 1, new_total[i, j])
+    h.Write()
+    for b in P.BANDS:
+        hb = ROOT.TH2D(f"hCov_lateralrepl5d_active_{b}", b, n, 0, n, n, 0, n)
+        for i in range(n):
+            for j in range(n):
+                hb.SetBinContent(i + 1, j + 1, active[b][i, j])
+        hb.Write()
+    fo.Close()
+    print(f"CANDIDATE written {a.out}: sqrt_tr={np.sqrt(max(0,np.trace(new_total))):.4e} "
+          f"min/max_eig={stats['min_eig']/max(1e-300,abs(stats['max_eig'])):.2e} (PASS gates)")
+    sys.exit(0)
+
+
+if __name__ == "__main__":
+    try:
+        main()
+    except P.P4GateError as e:
+        print(f"FAIL-CLOSED :: {e}"); sys.exit(1)

diff --git a/nd-unfolding/run_p4_merge_audit_std.sh b/nd-unfolding/run_p4_merge_audit_std.sh
new file mode 100755
index 0000000..0080c0e
--- /dev/null
+++ b/nd-unfolding/run_p4_merge_audit_std.sh
@@ -0,0 +1,35 @@
+#!/bin/bash
+# STANDARD P4 stage-1: 10 endpoint hadd-merges (CONC-capped for Lustre) + acceptance
+# audit. Runs inside a held interactive CPU alloc (via alloc_run srun --overlap; the
+# whole node is ours, so bare-background hadds are fine). skip-if-exists.
+set -o pipefail
+export HOME=/global/homes/j/josephrb
+REPO="/pscratch/sd/j/josephrb/MINERvA-OmniFold"; ND="${REPO}/nd-unfolding"
+PLAYLISTS=(1A 1B 1C 1D 1E 1F 1G 1L 1M 1N 1O 1P)
+BANDS=(BeamAngleX BeamAngleY MuonResolution Muon_Energy_MINERvA Muon_Energy_MINOS)
+MERGEDIR="${ND}/active_universe_5d/standard/merged"; mkdir -p "${MERGEDIR}"
+CONC="${CONC:-4}"
+echo "[p4-merge] start $(date -u +%T) CONC=${CONC}"
+valid_merged () {  # a complete merged ROOT opens with the 4 trees
+  python3 -c "import ROOT,sys; f=ROOT.TFile.Open('$1'); sys.exit(0 if (f and not f.IsZombie() and f.Get('mc_truth_denom') and f.Get('mc_signal_reco') and f.Get('mc_background') and f.Get('data')) else 1)" >/dev/null 2>&1
+}
+merge_one () {
+  local BAND="$1" EP="$2"
+  local MERGED="${MERGEDIR}/runEventLoopOmniFold_5D_MEFHC_active_${BAND}_${EP}.root"
+  if [[ -s "${MERGED}" ]] && valid_merged "${MERGED}"; then echo "[merge] SKIP ${BAND}:${EP} valid ($(stat -c '%s' "${MERGED}")B)"; return 0; fi
+  [[ -s "${MERGED}" ]] && echo "[merge] REDO ${BAND}:${EP} (existing invalid/partial)" && rm -f "${MERGED}"
+  local INPUTS=(); for PL in "${PLAYLISTS[@]}"; do local f="${ND}/active_universe_5d/standard/${BAND}_${EP}/runEventLoopOmniFold_5D_${PL}_active_${BAND}_${EP}.root"; [[ -s "$f" ]] && INPUTS+=("$f"); done
+  [[ ${#INPUTS[@]} -ne 12 ]] && { echo "[merge] ABORT ${BAND}:${EP} ${#INPUTS[@]}/12"; return 3; }
+  python "${REPO}/2d-unfolding/uq/hadd_universes_full.py" "${MERGED}" "${INPUTS[@]}" > "${MERGEDIR}/merge_${BAND}_${EP}.log" 2>&1 \
+    && echo "[merge] DONE ${BAND}:${EP} ($(stat -c '%s' "${MERGED}")B)" || { echo "[merge] FAIL ${BAND}:${EP}"; rm -f "${MERGED}"; }
+}
+for BAND in "${BANDS[@]}"; do for EP in 0 1; do
+  while [ "$(jobs -rp | wc -l)" -ge "$CONC" ]; do sleep 5; done
+  merge_one "$BAND" "$EP" &
+done; done
+wait
+NMERGED=$(find "${MERGEDIR}" -name 'runEventLoopOmniFold_5D_MEFHC_active_*.root' -size +0c 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
+echo "[p4-merge] merges done $(date -u +%T); merged=${NMERGED}/10"
+echo "[p4-audit] running acceptance audit..."
+cd "${ND}" && python3 p3s_manifest_summary.py --mode standard
+echo "[p4-merge-audit] complete $(date -u +%T)"

+#!/bin/bash
+# STANDARD P4 stage-2: unfold the 10 merged endpoints -> flat 5D xsec vectors.
+# Bare-background (NO nested srun) so it runs under a single outer
+# `srun --overlap --jobid=<holder>` step. Nominal unfold per merged endpoint
+# (NO --universe; the ROOT already IS the promoted universe), FIXED --seed 42 on
+# both endpoints so the MAT +/- pair cancels the CV. valid-skip so it resumes
+# after a wall on a fresh holder. Writes active_universe_5d/standard/unfolds/.
+set -o pipefail
+export HOME=/global/homes/j/josephrb
+REPO="/pscratch/sd/j/josephrb/MINERvA-OmniFold"; ND="${REPO}/nd-unfolding"
+BANDS=(BeamAngleX BeamAngleY MuonResolution Muon_Energy_MINERvA Muon_Energy_MINOS)
+MERGEDIR="${ND}/active_universe_5d/standard/merged"
+OUTDIR="${ND}/active_universe_5d/standard/unfolds"; mkdir -p "${OUTDIR}"
+CONC="${CONC:-4}"
+echo "[p4-unfold] start $(date -u +%T) CONC=${CONC}"
+# Fail-closed config/source validation: pin seed/iters/estimator/no-universe.
+cd "${ND}"
+CFG_HASH=$(python3 -c "import p4_lib; c=p4_lib.P4Config(); c.validate(); print(c.hash())") || {
+  echo "[p4-unfold] ABORT: config validation failed"; exit 2; }
+echo "[p4-unfold] config_hash=${CFG_HASH}"
+
+valid_unfold () {  # a complete unfold ROOT has hXSecND_flat
+  python3 -c "import ROOT,sys; f=ROOT.TFile.Open('$1'); sys.exit(0 if (f and not f.IsZombie() and f.Get('hXSecND_flat')) else 1)" >/dev/null 2>&1
+}
+unfold_one () {
+  local BAND="$1" EP="$2"
+  local MERGED="${MERGEDIR}/runEventLoopOmniFold_5D_MEFHC_active_${BAND}_${EP}.root"
+  local OUT="${OUTDIR}/5d_xsec_MEFHC_5iter_lgbm_uni_full_${BAND}_${EP}.root"
+  if [[ -s "${OUT}" ]] && valid_unfold "${OUT}"; then echo "[unfold] SKIP ${BAND}:${EP} valid"; return 0; fi
+  [[ -s "${OUT}" ]] && echo "[unfold] REDO ${BAND}:${EP} (partial)" && rm -f "${OUT}"
+  [[ ! -s "${MERGED}" ]] && { echo "[unfold] ABORT ${BAND}:${EP} merged missing"; return 3; }
+  cd "${ND}"
+  local t0=$(date +%s)
+  if python3 unfold_nd_omnifold_unbinned.py --omnifile "${MERGED}" --axes eavail,q3,W \
+       --iters 5 --use-weights --estimator lgbm --seed 42 --out "${OUT}" --verbose \
+       > "${OUTDIR}/unfold_${BAND}_${EP}.log" 2>&1 && [[ -s "${OUT}" ]] && valid_unfold "${OUT}"; then
+    printf '{"config_hash":"%s","band":"%s","endpoint":%s,"seed":42,"t":"%s"}\n' \
+      "${CFG_HASH}" "${BAND}" "${EP}" "$(date -u +%FT%TZ)" > "${OUT}.done.tmp" && mv -f "${OUT}.done.tmp" "${OUT}.done"
+    echo "[unfold] DONE ${BAND}:${EP} $(( $(date +%s)-t0 ))s"
+  else
+    echo "[unfold] FAIL ${BAND}:${EP} rc=$? (see unfold_${BAND}_${EP}.log)"; rm -f "${OUT}"
+  fi
+}
+for BAND in "${BANDS[@]}"; do for EP in 0 1; do
+  while [ "$(jobs -rp | wc -l)" -ge "$CONC" ]; do sleep 8; done
+  unfold_one "${BAND}" "${EP}" &
+done; done
+wait
+N=$(find "${OUTDIR}" -name '5d_xsec_MEFHC_5iter_lgbm_uni_full_*_?.root' -size +0c 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
+echo "[p4-unfold] done $(date -u +%T); unfolds present=${N}/10"
+# Fail-closed: the driver only returns success on a complete 10/10 set.
+if [[ "${N}" -ne 10 ]]; then echo "[p4-unfold] FAIL-CLOSED: ${N}/10 (incomplete — resume on a fresh holder)"; exit 5; fi
+echo "[p4-unfold] COMPLETE 10/10"

    37	def load_th2_key(path, key):
    38	    f = ROOT.TFile.Open(path)

    50	def mat_gates(C, tag):
    51	    r = {}
    52	    r["shape"] = list(C.shape)
    53	    r["all_finite"] = bool(np.all(np.isfinite(C)))
    54	    asym = np.max(np.abs(C - C.T)) / max(1e-300, np.max(np.abs(C)))
    55	    r["rel_asymmetry"] = float(asym)
    56	    Cs = 0.5 * (C + C.T)
    57	    ev = np.linalg.eigvalsh(Cs)
    58	    r["min_eig"] = float(ev[0]); r["max_eig"] = float(ev[-1])
    59	    r["min_over_max_eig"] = float(ev[0] / max(1e-300, ev[-1]))
    60	    r["psd"] = bool(ev[0] >= -1e-12 * abs(ev[-1]))
    61	    d = np.diag(C)
    62	    r["diag_finite_nonneg"] = bool(np.all(np.isfinite(d)) and np.all(d >= -1e-30))
    63	    r["sqrt_trace"] = float(np.sqrt(np.clip(np.trace(Cs), 0, None)))
    64	    r["n_reported"] = int(np.sum(d > 0))

    67	          f"sqrt_tr={r['sqrt_trace']:.4e}")
    68	    return r

     1	#!/usr/bin/env python3
     2	"""P3S/P3F receipt: enumerate the 5x2x12 active-universe endpoint ROOTs, verify
     3	each, and emit an exact manifest + per-endpoint summary for the campaign commit
     4	gate. Fingerprint per file = size + per-tree entry counts + POT + native-miss and
     5	migration-census TParameters (cheaper and more meaningful than md5 of ~6.7 GB).
     6	
     7	Usage: p3s_manifest_summary.py [--mode standard|fps] [--out <json>]
     8	"""
     9	import argparse, glob, json, os, sys
    10	import ROOT
    11	
    12	BANDS = ["BeamAngleX", "BeamAngleY", "MuonResolution",
    13	         "Muon_Energy_MINERvA", "Muon_Energy_MINOS"]
    14	PLAYLISTS = ["1A","1B","1C","1D","1E","1F","1G","1L","1M","1N","1O","1P"]
    15	TREES = ["mc_truth_denom", "mc_signal_reco", "mc_background", "data"]
    16	PARAMS = ["mcPOTUsed","dataPOTUsed","nTruthOnlyMisses","hasActiveUniverse",
    17	          "activeUniverseIsLateral","activeUniverseTruthEntrants",
    18	          "activeUniverseTruthExits","activeUniverseRecoEntrants",
    19	          "activeUniverseRecoExits"]
    20	
    21	def main():
    22	    ap = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    23	    ap.add_argument("--mode", default="standard")
    24	    ap.add_argument("--repo", default="/pscratch/sd/j/josephrb/MINERvA-OmniFold")
    25	    ap.add_argument("--out", default=None)
    26	    a = ap.parse_args()
    27	    base = os.path.join(a.repo, "nd-unfolding", "active_universe_5d", a.mode)
    28	    out = a.out or os.path.join(base, f"p3s_{a.mode}_manifest.json")
    29	
    30	    files, present, missing = [], 0, []
    31	    endpoints = {}
    32	    for band in BANDS:
    33	        for ep in (0, 1):
    34	            key = f"{band}_{ep}"
    35	            agg = {"playlists_present": 0, "size_bytes": 0,
    36	                   "entries": {t: 0 for t in TREES},
    37	                   "mcPOT": 0.0, "dataPOT": 0.0, "nMisses": 0,
    38	                   "migration_abs": 0, "isLateral": None}
    39	            for pl in PLAYLISTS:
    40	                p = os.path.join(base, key,
    41	                                 f"runEventLoopOmniFold_5D_{pl}_active_{band}_{ep}.root")
    42	                rec = {"band": band, "endpoint": ep, "playlist": pl,
    43	                       "path": os.path.relpath(p, a.repo), "exists": os.path.exists(p)}
    44	                if not rec["exists"] or os.path.getsize(p) == 0:
    45	                    missing.append(f"{key}/{pl}"); files.append(rec); continue
    46	                rec["size"] = os.path.getsize(p)
    47	                f = ROOT.TFile.Open(p)
    48	                ok = f and not f.IsZombie()
    49	                rec["readable"] = bool(ok)
    50	                if ok:
    51	                    ent = {}
    52	                    for t in TREES:
    53	                        tr = f.Get(t); ent[t] = int(tr.GetEntries()) if tr else -1
    54	                    rec["entries"] = ent
    55	                    pv = {}
    56	                    for k in PARAMS:
    57	                        o = f.Get(k); pv[k] = (o.GetVal() if o else None)
    58	                    rec["params"] = pv
    59	                    agg["playlists_present"] += 1
    60	                    agg["size_bytes"] += rec["size"]
    61	                    for t in TREES:
    62	                        if ent[t] > 0: agg["entries"][t] += ent[t]
    63	                    agg["mcPOT"] += pv.get("mcPOTUsed") or 0.0
    64	                    agg["dataPOT"] += pv.get("dataPOTUsed") or 0.0
    65	                    agg["nMisses"] += int(pv.get("nTruthOnlyMisses") or 0)
    66	                    agg["migration_abs"] += sum(abs(int(pv.get(k) or 0)) for k in
    67	                        ("activeUniverseTruthEntrants","activeUniverseTruthExits",
    68	                         "activeUniverseRecoEntrants","activeUniverseRecoExits"))
    69	                    if agg["isLateral"] is None and pv.get("activeUniverseIsLateral") is not None:
    70	                        agg["isLateral"] = int(pv["activeUniverseIsLateral"])
    71	                    present += 1
    72	                f.Close()
    73	                files.append(rec)
    74	            # completeness self-check: signal_reco == truth_denom (Phase 18.2)
    75	            td, sg = agg["entries"]["mc_truth_denom"], agg["entries"]["mc_signal_reco"]
    76	            agg["completeness_sig_over_td"] = (sg / td) if td else None
    77	            endpoints[key] = agg
    78	
    79	    summary = {
    80	        "mode": a.mode, "expected": 120, "present": present,
    81	        "complete": present == 120, "missing": missing,
    82	        "endpoints": endpoints,
    83	    }
    84	    with open(out, "w") as fh:
    85	        json.dump({"summary": summary, "files": files}, fh, indent=2)
    86	
    87	    print(f"[p3s-manifest] mode={a.mode} present={present}/120 "
    88	          f"complete={summary['complete']} missing={len(missing)}")
    89	    for key, agg in endpoints.items():
    90	        c = agg["completeness_sig_over_td"]
    91	        print(f"  {key:26s} {agg['playlists_present']:2d}/12  lat={agg['isLateral']}  "
    92	              f"td={agg['entries']['mc_truth_denom']:>10d}  "
    93	              f"c={('%.6f'%c) if c else 'NA':>8}  mig|abs|={agg['migration_abs']:>6d}  "
    94	              f"misses={agg['nMisses']}")
    95	    print(f"summary -> {out}")
    96	    sys.exit(0 if summary["complete"] else 2)
    97	
    98	if __name__ == "__main__":
    99	    main()

     1	#!/usr/bin/env python3
     2	"""Adopt the rigorous 5D unified-throw systematic into the published combined 5D covariance.
     3	
     4	5D (pt,pz,Eavail,q3,W) analogue of adopt_unified_4d.py. The unified throw
     5	(uq_5d/unified_throw_cov_5d.root, joint re-unfolds of the 12 knob bands + 100 flux
     6	universes) measures the per-bin systematic variance INCLUDING the nonlinear
     7	cross-band term the block-sum drops. But with n_throws << bins, C_unified is a
     8	low-rank (noisy) estimate of the full N x N matrix; swapping the whole matrix in
     9	directly breaks positive-definiteness. So -- exactly as in 4D (adopt_unified_4d.py) --
    10	we adopt the throw's fractional per-bin variance INFLATION and transfer it onto the
    11	SWEEP's own vertical block, PSD by construction:
    12	
    13	    g_i = sqrt( max(sigma_uni_i^2, sigma_block_i^2) ) / sigma_block_i   >= 1
    14	    C_combined_new = (C_combined_old - C_vert_sweep) + G C_vert_sweep G
    15	                   = C_combined_old + (g_i g_j - 1) * C_vert_sweep       <- PSD by construction
    16	
    17	C_vert_sweep = sum of the 13 vertical per-band covs (12 knobs + Flux) the throw covers,
    18	from the combined file's per-band hCov_universe5d_<band> (same sweep estimator as C_comb).
    19	The 9 detector-lateral bands and the stat/ML blocks already inside hCov_combined5d_total
    20	are left untouched -- the throw does not cover them. The conservative max() never
    21	UNDER-covers vs the block baseline; it inflates where the nonlinear cross-term is real.
    22	
    23	Memory-frugal: 10694^2 f64 ~= 0.9 GB/matrix; only C_comb + C_vert are resident, and
    24	C_new is built into C_comb row-by-row (1-D temporaries), so peak ~2 matrices + eigvalsh.
    25	
    26	  python adopt_unified_5d.py    # -> uq_5d/universe_stage2_5d/uq_universe_5d_covariance_combined_uthrow.root
    27	"""
    28	import argparse
    29	import gc
    30	import sys
    31	
    32	import numpy as np
    33

    39	# the 13 vertical bands the 5D unified throw covers (12 KNOB_BANDS + Flux); identical

    41	VERT_BANDS = ["2p2h", "CCQEPauliSupViaKF", "FrAbs_pi", "FrElas_N", "HighQ2", "LowQ2",
    42	              "MaCCQE", "MaRES", "MFP_N", "MvRES", "Rvn2pi", "Rvp2pi", "Flux"]

    45	def _th2(h):
    46	    nx, ny = h.GetNbinsX(), h.GetNbinsY()
    47	    b = np.frombuffer(h.GetArray(), dtype=np.float64, count=(nx + 2) * (ny + 2)).reshape(ny + 2, nx + 2)
    48	    return b[1:ny + 1, 1:nx + 1].T.copy()

    51	def _diag(h):
    52	    """Read only the diagonal of a square TH2D (no full-matrix materialization)."""
    53	    n = h.GetNbinsX()
    54	    return np.array([h.GetBinContent(i + 1, i + 1) for i in range(n)])

    57	def _write_th2(name, title, M):
    58	    """Fast dense TH2D write via the writable ROOT buffer (avoids 1e8 SetBinContent calls)."""
    59	    import ROOT
    60	    n = M.shape[0]
    61	    h = ROOT.TH2D(name, title, n, 0, n, n, 0, n)
    62	    arr = np.frombuffer(h.GetArray(), dtype=np.float64, count=(n + 2) * (n + 2)).reshape(n + 2, n + 2)
    63	    try:
    64	        arr.setflags(write=True)
    65	    except Exception:
    66	        pass
    67	    arr[1:n + 1, 1:n + 1] = M.T   # _th2 reads inner.T; for symmetric M this round-trips exactly
    68	    return h

    71	def main():
    72	    import ROOT
    73	    ROOT.gErrorIgnoreLevel = ROOT.kError
    74	    ap = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    75	    ap.add_argument("--uthrow", default="uq_5d/unified_throw_cov_5d.root")
    76	    ap.add_argument("--combined",
    77	                    default="uq_5d/universe_stage2_5d/uq_universe_5d_covariance_combined.root")
    78	    ap.add_argument("--prod", default="products/5d/xsec_5d_MEFHC_5iter_lgbm.root")
    79	    ap.add_argument("--out",
    80	                    default="uq_5d/universe_stage2_5d/uq_universe_5d_covariance_combined_uthrow.root")
    81	    ap.add_argument("--cv-centered", action="store_true",
    82	                    help="F7 CV-centered variant: add per-bin joint mean_shift^2 to the unified "
    83	                         "variance (default is mean-centered, diag(C_unified) only)")
    84	    args = ap.parse_args()
    85	
    86	    # --- per-bin inflation factor g from the throw (diagonals only; cheap) ---
    87	    fu = ROOT.TFile.Open(args.uthrow)
    88	    vu = np.clip(_diag(fu.Get("C_unified")), 0, None)   # unified per-bin variance (mean-centered)
    89	    vb = np.clip(_diag(fu.Get("C_blocksum")), 0, None)  # bank block-sum per-bin variance (comparator)
    90	    if args.cv_centered:
    91	        # F7: CV-centered variance = mean-centered variance + shift^2 (do NOT silently drop the shift)
    92	        hms = fu.Get("hJointMeanShift")
    93	        ms = np.array([hms.GetBinContent(i + 1) for i in range(hms.GetNbinsX())])
    94	        assert ms.size == vu.size, f"mean_shift dim {ms.size} != unified dim {vu.size}"
    95	        vu = vu + ms ** 2
    96	    fu.Close()
    97	    s_adopt = np.sqrt(np.maximum(vu, vb))               # conservative: never below block baseline
    98	    sb = np.sqrt(vb)
    99	    n = vu.size
   100	    g = np.ones(n)
   101	    m = sb > 0
   102	    g[m] = s_adopt[m] / sb[m]                            # >= 1
   103	
   104	    # --- reported CV (frac/bin diagnostics + dim check) ---
   105	    fp = ROOT.TFile.Open(args.prod)
   106	    h = fp.Get("hXSecND_flat")
   107	    xfull = np.array([h.GetBinContent(i + 1) for i in range(h.GetNbinsX())])
   108	    fp.Close()
   109	    x = xfull[xfull > 0]
   110	    assert x.size == n, f"reported CV ({x.size}) != throw dim ({n})"
   111	
   112	    # --- load C_comb (becomes C_new in place) + the sweep vertical block sum ---
   113	    fc = ROOT.TFile.Open(args.combined)
   114	    C_new = _th2(fc.Get("hCov_combined5d_total"))
   115	    assert C_new.shape == (n, n), f"combined dim {C_new.shape} != throw dim {n}"
   116	    sqrt_tr_comb = float(np.sqrt(np.trace(C_new)))
   117	    diag_comb = np.clip(np.diag(C_new), 0, None).copy()
   118	    C_vert = None
   119	    for b in VERT_BANDS:
   120	        hb = fc.Get(f"hCov_universe5d_{b}")
   121	        if not hb:
   122	            raise SystemExit(f"[FAIL] missing per-band cov hCov_universe5d_{b}")
   123	        cb = _th2(hb)
   124	        if C_vert is None:
   125	            C_vert = cb
   126	        else:
   127	            C_vert += cb
   128	            del cb
   129	            gc.collect()
   130	    fc.Close()
   131	
   132	    # --- C_new = C_comb + (g_i g_j - 1) * C_vert   (row-by-row; peak ~2 matrices) ---
   133	    for i in range(n):
   134	        C_new[i, :] += (g[i] * g - 1.0) * C_vert[i, :]
   135	    del C_vert
   136	    gc.collect()
   137	
   138	    # --- verification (eigvalsh reads the lower triangle; construction-symmetric) ---
   139	    ev = np.linalg.eigvalsh(C_new)
   140	    diag_new = np.clip(np.diag(C_new), 0, None)
   141	    do = np.sqrt(diag_comb) / x
   142	    dn = np.sqrt(diag_new) / x
   143	    sqrt_tr_new = float(np.sqrt(np.trace(C_new)))
   144	    print(f"[adopt5d] bins                = {n}  (reported)")
   145	    print(f"[adopt5d] inflation g: bins>1 = {(g > 1.0001).sum()} ({100*(g>1.0001).mean():.1f}%)  "
   146	          f"median={np.median(g):.3f}  max={g.max():.2f}")
   147	    print(f"[adopt5d] sqrt-trace  old combined = {sqrt_tr_comb:.4e}")
   148	    print(f"[adopt5d] sqrt-trace  new combined = {sqrt_tr_new:.4e}  "
   149	          f"(x{sqrt_tr_new/sqrt_tr_comb:.3f})")
   150	    print(f"[adopt5d] median frac/bin  old={100*np.median(do):.2f}%   new={100*np.median(dn):.2f}%")
   151	    print(f"[adopt5d] PSD check: min eigenvalue = {ev[0]:.3e}  "
   152	          f"(neg: {(ev<0).sum()}; most-neg/max = {ev[0]/ev[-1]:.2e})")
   153	    if ev[0] < -1e-12 * ev[-1]:
   154	        raise SystemExit("[FAIL] adopted covariance is not PSD")
   155	    print("[adopt5d] PSD OK (PSD by construction: lateral+stat+ML + G C_vert G)")
   156	
   157	    # --- write ---
   158	    fo = ROOT.TFile.Open(args.out, "RECREATE")
   159	    hnew = _write_th2("hCov_combined5d_total_uthrow",
   160	                      "combined 5D cov (unified-throw adopted)", C_new)
   161	    hnew.Write()
   162	    hg = ROOT.TH1D("hInflation_g", "per-bin unified/block sigma inflation", n, 0, n)
   163	    for i in range(n):
   164	        hg.SetBinContent(i + 1, g[i])
   165	    hg.Write()
   166	    ROOT.TParameter("double")("sqrt_tr_old", sqrt_tr_comb).Write()
   167	    ROOT.TParameter("double")("sqrt_tr_new", sqrt_tr_new).Write()
   168	    fo.Close()
   169	    print(f"[adopt5d] wrote {args.out}")
   170

     1	#!/usr/bin/env python3
     2	"""P7 covariance marginalization: project an N-D cross-section covariance onto a
     3	lower-dimensional subset of axes as C_low = M C_high M^T (uq_math.project_covariance).
     4	
     5	The stored cross section is a DIFFERENTIAL DENSITY per unit bin-volume
     6	(xsec_nd.extract_cross_section_nd divides by prod_a dx_a). Marginalizing over an
     7	axis is therefore a WIDTH-WEIGHTED sum: M's nonzero entries are the product of the
     8	bin widths of the DROPPED axes, grouped into the destination (kept-axis) bin.
     9	Unit-weight M would be WRONG for this convention. This mirrors the validated maps in
    10	eavail_generator_significance.py:83-89 (4D->E_avail) and eavailW_covariance.py:290-304
    11	(5D->(E_avail,W)); the only generalization here is arbitrary keep-axis subsets.
    12	
    13	Axis order is the C-order ravel convention (pt, pz, eavail, q3[, W]). The reported
    14	mask is CV>0. When --dst-cv is given, the destination reported mask/shape is taken
    15	from that frozen lower-D central product (so masks match a real result); otherwise
    16	the destination reports every bin that receives a reported source cell.
    17	
    18	  # 5D adopted covariance -> exact 4D marginal (drop W), reporting onto the 4D CV mask
    19	  python project_cov_nd.py \
    20	      --src-cov uq_5d/.../uq_universe_5d_covariance_combined_bkgaware_uthrow.root \
    21	      --src-hist hCov_combined5d_total_uthrow \
    22	      --src-cv products/5d/xsec_5d_MEFHC_5iter_lgbm.root --src-axes pt,pz,eavail,q3,W \
    23	      --keep-axes pt,pz,eavail,q3 \
    24	      --dst-cv products/4d/xsec_4d_MEFHC_5iter_lgbm.root \
    25	      --out uq_4d/corrected/projections_candidate/cov_5d_to_4d_marginal.root
    26	"""
    27	import argparse
    28	import os
    29	import sys
    30	
    31	import numpy as np

    33	_REPO = "/pscratch/sd/j/josephrb/MINERvA-OmniFold"

    38	from uq_math import project_covariance              # noqa: E402  (ROOT-free)

    40	# Canonical analysis bin edges (C-order axes pt,pz,eavail,q3,W). Hardcoded so the
    41	# M-construction stays ROOT-free/testable; _verify_canonical_edges() below fails
    42	# closed if these ever drift from unfold_2d/unfold_nd (which import ROOT).
    43	AXIS_EDGES = {
    44	    "pt": np.array([0, 0.07, 0.15, 0.25, 0.33, 0.40, 0.47, 0.55,
    45	                    0.70, 0.85, 1.00, 1.25, 1.50, 2.50, 4.50], float),
    46	    "pz": np.array([1.5, 2.0, 2.5, 3.0, 3.5, 4.0, 4.5, 5.0,
    47	                    6.0, 7.0, 8.0, 9.0, 10.0, 15.0, 20.0, 40.0, 60.0], float),
    48	    "eavail": np.array([0.0, 0.1, 0.2, 0.4, 0.8, 1.5, 3.0, 100.0], float),
    49	    "q3": np.array([0.0, 0.2, 0.4, 0.6, 0.8, 1.2, 2.0, 100.0], float),
    50	    "W": np.array([0.0, 1.1, 1.4, 1.8, 2.2, 3.0, 100.0], float),
    51	}

    54	def _verify_canonical_edges():
    55	    """Fail closed if the hardcoded edges drift from the canonical modules."""
    56	    import unfold_2d_omnifold_unbinned as u2d       # imports ROOT
    57	    import unfold_nd_omnifold_unbinned as und
    58	    ref = {"pt": u2d.PT_EDGES, "pz": u2d.PZ_EDGES,
    59	           "eavail": und.EXTRA_AXES["eavail"]["edges"],
    60	           "q3": und.EXTRA_AXES["q3"]["edges"], "W": und.EXTRA_AXES["W"]["edges"]}
    61	    for a, e in ref.items():
    62	        if not np.allclose(np.asarray(e, float), AXIS_EDGES[a]):
    63	            raise SystemExit(f"[FAIL] canonical edge drift on axis {a}: "
    64	                             f"{np.asarray(e, float)} != {AXIS_EDGES[a]}")
    65	
    66	
    67	def _th1(h):
    68	    return np.array([h.GetBinContent(i + 1) for i in range(h.GetNbinsX())])
    69	
    70	
    71	def _th2(h):
    72	    nx, ny = h.GetNbinsX(), h.GetNbinsY()
    73	    b = np.frombuffer(h.GetArray(), dtype=np.float64,
    74	                      count=(nx + 2) * (ny + 2)).reshape(ny + 2, nx + 2)
    75	    return b[1:ny + 1, 1:nx + 1].T.copy()

    78	def build_projection(src_axes, keep_axes, src_report, src_shape, dst_shape, dst_index_of):
    79	    """M (n_dst x n_src_reported): entries = product of dropped-axis bin widths,
    80	    grouped into the destination flat index. dst_index_of maps a dense dst flat index
    81	    to the destination reported row (or -1 to drop)."""
    82	    drop_axes = [a for a in src_axes if a not in keep_axes]
    83	    keep_pos = [src_axes.index(a) for a in keep_axes]
    84	    idx = np.unravel_index(src_report, src_shape)          # C-order, tuple of arrays
    85	    # width weight = product over dropped axes of that axis's bin width
    86	    w = np.ones(src_report.size)
    87	    for a in drop_axes:
    88	        pos = src_axes.index(a)
    89	        w = w * np.diff(AXIS_EDGES[a])[idx[pos]]
    90	    # destination dense flat index from the kept-axis coordinates
    91	    dst_coords = tuple(idx[p] for p in keep_pos)
    92	    dst_dense = np.ravel_multi_index(dst_coords, dst_shape)
    93	    dst_row = dst_index_of[dst_dense]                       # reported row or -1
    94	    n_dst = int((dst_index_of >= 0).sum())
    95	    M = np.zeros((n_dst, src_report.size))
    96	    keep = dst_row >= 0
    97	    M[dst_row[keep], np.arange(src_report.size)[keep]] = w[keep]
    98	    dropped = int((~keep).sum())
    99	    return M, dropped

   102	def main():
   103	    import ROOT
   104	    ap = argparse.ArgumentParser(description=__doc__,
   105	                                 formatter_class=argparse.RawDescriptionHelpFormatter)
   106	    ap.add_argument("--src-cov", required=True)
   107	    ap.add_argument("--src-hist", required=True)
   108	    ap.add_argument("--src-cv", required=True, help="source CV product (hXSecND_flat) for mask+shape")
   109	    ap.add_argument("--src-axes", required=True, help="comma list, C-order, e.g. pt,pz,eavail,q3,W")
   110	    ap.add_argument("--keep-axes", required=True, help="comma list subset to keep")
   111	    ap.add_argument("--dst-cv", default=None,
   112	                    help="frozen lower-D CV product; its CV>0 mask defines the destination "
   113	                         "reported bins. If omitted, report every bin that receives a source cell.")
   114	    ap.add_argument("--out", required=True)
   115	    args = ap.parse_args()
   116	    _verify_canonical_edges()
   117	
   118	    src_axes = args.src_axes.split(",")
   119	    keep_axes = args.keep_axes.split(",")
   120	    if not set(keep_axes).issubset(set(src_axes)):
   121	        raise SystemExit(f"[FAIL] keep-axes {keep_axes} not a subset of src-axes {src_axes}")
   122	    if list(keep_axes) != [a for a in src_axes if a in keep_axes]:
   123	        raise SystemExit("[FAIL] keep-axes must preserve the source C-order")
   124	    for a in src_axes:

   126	            raise SystemExit(f"[FAIL] unknown axis {a}")
   127	
   128	    src_shape = tuple(len(AXIS_EDGES[a]) - 1 for a in src_axes)
   129	    dst_shape = tuple(len(AXIS_EDGES[a]) - 1 for a in keep_axes)
   130	
   131	    fcv = ROOT.TFile.Open(args.src_cv)

   135	    src_report = np.where(xsrc > 0)[0]

   147	        xdst = _th1(fd.Get("hXSecND_flat")); fd.Close()

   162	                                  dst_shape, dst_index_of)
   163	    n_dst = M.shape[0]

   165	    C_low = 0.5 * (C_low + C_low.T)
   166	
   167	    # --- CV reproduction: y = M x_src should match the frozen dst CV (density) ---
   168	    y = M @ xsrc[src_report]
   169	    print(f"[proj] {src_axes} -> keep {keep_axes}")
   170	    print(f"[proj] src reported = {src_report.size}  dst reported = {n_dst}  "
   171	          f"src cells dropped (dst bin not reported) = {dropped}")
   172	    if x_dst_cv is not None:
   173	        rows_hit = np.zeros(n_dst, bool)
   174	        # count dst-reported bins that received zero source cells
   175	        received = np.asarray(M != 0).any(axis=1)
   176	        n_empty = int((~received).sum())

   178	            rel = np.where(x_dst_cv > 0, np.abs(y - x_dst_cv) / x_dst_cv, 0.0)
   179	        print(f"[proj] dst-reported bins receiving NO source cell = {n_empty}")
   180	        print(f"[proj] CV reproduction M x_src vs frozen dst CV: "
   181	              f"max|rel|={rel.max():.3e} median={np.median(rel):.3e} "
   182	              f"(expected ~<=3% -- independent lower-D central vs marginal)")
   183	
   184	    ev = np.linalg.eigvalsh(C_low)
   185	    sym = float(np.abs(C_low - C_low.T).max())
   186	    rc = 1e-12
   187	    rank = int((ev > ev.max() * rc).sum()) if ev.size else 0

   189	    print(f"[proj] symmetry max|C-C^T|={sym:.2e}  min-eig={ev[0]:.3e}  "

   194	    os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(args.out) or ".", exist_ok=True)

   198	                  n_dst, 0, n_dst, n_dst, 0, n_dst)

/usr/bin/bash -lc "export HOME=/global/homes/j/josephrb
source ./setup_salloc_env.sh >/dev/null 2>&1
python3 - <<'PY'
import ROOT, numpy as np, hashlib, glob, os, json
ROOT.gErrorIgnoreLevel=ROOT.kError
base='nd-unfolding/active_universe_5d/standard/unfolds'
cvp='nd-unfolding/products/5d/xsec_5d_MEFHC_5iter_lgbm.root'

def open_clean(p):
 f=ROOT.TFile.Open(p)
 ok=bool(f) and not f.IsZombie()
 rec=bool(f.TestBit(ROOT.TFile.kRecovered)) if ok else None
 return f,ok,rec

def vec(f):
 h=f.Get('hXSecND_flat')
 if not h: return None
 return np.array([h.GetBinContent(i+1) for i in range(h.GetNbinsX())],dtype=np.float64)

fc,ok,rec=open_clean(cvp); cv=vec(fc)
print('CENTRAL',json.dumps({'path':cvp,'clean':ok and not rec,'n':None if cv is None else int(cv.size),'finite':None if cv is None else bool(np.isfinite(cv).all()),'positive_count':None if cv is None else int((cv>0).sum()),'sum':None if cv is None else float(cv.sum()),'keys':[(k.GetName(),k.GetClassName()) for k in fc.GetListOfKeys()]}))
idx=np.nonzero(cv>0)[0].astype(np.int64)
print('CENTRAL_MASK_HASH',hashlib.sha256(idx.tobytes()+b'|C').hexdigest(),len(idx))
fc.Close()
recs={}; arrays={}
for p in sorted(glob.glob(base+'/5d_xsec_MEFHC_5iter_lgbm_uni_full_*_?.root')):
 tag=os.path.basename(p).split('_uni_full_',1)[1][:-5]
 f,ok,rec=open_clean(p); x=vec(f)
 keys=[(k.GetName(),k.GetClassName()) for k in f.GetListOfKeys()]
 rr={'clean':bool(ok and not rec),'recovered':rec,'n':None if x is None else int(x.size),'finite':None if x is None else bool(np.isfinite(x).all()),'positive_count':None if x is None else int((x>0).sum()),'sum':None if x is None else float(x.sum()),'mask_equal_cv':None if x is None else bool(np.array_equal(x>0,cv>0)),'keys':keys}
 recs[tag]=rr; arrays[tag]=x
 f.Close()
 print('UNFOLD',tag,json.dumps(rr,separators=(',',':')))
for band in ('BeamAngleX','BeamAngleY','MuonResolution','Muon_Energy_MINERvA','Muon_Energy_MINOS'):
 a=arrays[band+'_0']; b=arrays[band+'_1']; d=b-a
 print('PAIR',band,json.dumps({'identical':bool(np.array_equal(a,b)),'finite_diff':bool(np.isfinite(d).all()),'nonzero_diff_bins':int(np.count_nonzero(d)),'l2_diff':float(np.linalg.norm(d)),'max_abs_diff':float(np.max(np.abs(d))),'minus_sum':float(a.sum()),'plus_sum':float(b.sum())},separators=(',',':')))

mroot='nd-unfolding/active_universe_5d/standard/merged'
params=('mcPOTUsed','dataPOTUsed','hasTruthOnlyMisses','nTruthOnlyMisses','hasActiveUniverse','activeUniverseIsLateral','activeUniverseBand','activeUniverseIndex','activeUniverseTruthEntrants','activeUniverseTruthExits','activeUniverseRecoEntrants','activeUniverseRecoExits')
def gv(f,k):
 o=f.Get(k)
 if not o:return None
 if hasattr(o,'GetVal'): return o.GetVal()
 if hasattr(o,'GetTitle'): return str(o.GetTitle())
 return None
for p in sorted(glob.glob(mroot+'/runEventLoopOmniFold_5D_MEFHC_active_*_?.root')):
 tag=os.path.basename(p).split('_active_',1)[1][:-5]
 f,ok,rec=open_clean(p)
 entries={t:(int(f.Get(t).GetEntries()) if f.Get(t) else None) for t in ('mc_truth_denom','mc_signal_reco','mc_background','data')}
 pv={k:gv(f,k) for k in params}
 print('MERGED',tag,json.dumps({'clean':bool(ok and not rec),'entries':entries,'params':pv},separators=(',',':')))
 f.Close()
PY"

     9	def guarded_ratio(ratio, name="ratio", invalid_policy="error", clip=(1e-2, 1e2)):
    10	    """Validate a universe/CV ratio and make any neutralization explicit."""
    11	    ratio = np.asarray(ratio, dtype=float)
    12	    bad = ~np.isfinite(ratio) | (ratio <= 0.0)
    13	    if np.any(bad):
    14	        message = f"{name} contains {int(bad.sum())}/{ratio.size} non-finite or non-positive values"
    15	        if invalid_policy == "error":
    16	            raise ValueError(message)
    17	        if invalid_policy != "neutral":
    18	            raise ValueError(f"unknown invalid-ratio policy: {invalid_policy}")
    19	        print(f"[ratio][WARN] {message}; replacing with neutral ratio 1", flush=True)
    20	        ratio = ratio.copy()
    21	        ratio[bad] = 1.0
    22	    if clip is None:
    23	        return ratio
    24	    clipped = (ratio < clip[0]) | (ratio > clip[1])
    25	    if np.any(clipped):
    26	        print(f"[ratio][WARN] {name}: clipping {int(clipped.sum())}/{ratio.size} "
    27	              f"ratios to {clip}", flush=True)
    28	    return np.clip(ratio, *clip)

    31	def require_truth_ratio_bank(bank, bands, expected_flux=100):
    32	    """Require every truth-side +/- endpoint and an exact contiguous flux inventory."""
    33	    bank = Path(bank)
    34	    missing = [f"sig_{band}_t_{idx}.npy" for band in bands for idx in (0, 1)
    35	               if not (bank / f"sig_{band}_t_{idx}.npy").is_file()]
    36	    if missing:
    37	        raise ValueError(f"incomplete truth-ratio bank {bank}: missing {missing}")
    38	
    39	    flux_ids = set()
    40	    malformed = []
    41	    prefix = "sig_flux_t_"
    42	    for path in bank.glob(f"{prefix}*.npy"):
    43	        suffix = path.name[len(prefix):-4]
    44	        if suffix.isdigit():
    45	            flux_ids.add(int(suffix))
    46	        else:
    47	            malformed.append(path.name)
    48	    expected = set(range(int(expected_flux)))
    49	    if malformed or flux_ids != expected:
    50	        raise ValueError(
    51	            f"invalid flux bank {bank}: malformed={sorted(malformed)} "
    52	            f"missing={sorted(expected-flux_ids)} extra={sorted(flux_ids-expected)}"
    53	        )
    54	    return list(range(int(expected_flux)))
    55

    57	def _positive_finite_ratio(ratio, name="ratio"):
    58	    ratio = np.asarray(ratio, dtype=float)
    59	    bad = ~np.isfinite(ratio) | (ratio <= 0.0)
    60	    if np.any(bad):
    61	        raise ValueError(
    62	            f"{name} contains {int(bad.sum())}/{ratio.size} non-finite or non-positive values"
    63	        )
    64	    return ratio
    65	
    66	
    67	def interpolate_asymmetric_ratio(g, rho_plus, rho_minus):
    68	    """Interpolate an asymmetric nuisance, preserving both +/-1 sigma branches.
    69	
    70	    rho(g) = rho_plus**g for g>=0 and rho_minus**(-g) for g<0.
    71	    Invalid or zero ratios are rejected instead of silently becoming CV.
    72	    """
    73	    plus = _positive_finite_ratio(rho_plus, "rho_plus")
    74	    minus = _positive_finite_ratio(rho_minus, "rho_minus")
    75	    if plus.shape != minus.shape:
    76	        raise ValueError(f"rho shape mismatch: {plus.shape} != {minus.shape}")
    77	    gg = np.asarray(g, dtype=float)
    78	    if not np.all(np.isfinite(gg)):
    79	        raise ValueError("nuisance g must be finite")
    80	    if gg.ndim == 0:
    81	        if float(gg) == 0.0:
    82	            return np.ones_like(plus)
    83	        return plus ** float(gg) if gg > 0 else minus ** float(-gg)
    84	    try:
    85	        gb = np.broadcast_to(gg, plus.shape)
    86	    except ValueError as exc:
    87	        raise ValueError(f"g shape {gg.shape} is not broadcastable to ratios {plus.shape}") from exc
    88	    out = np.ones_like(plus)
    89	    pos = gb > 0
    90	    neg = gb < 0
    91	    out[pos] = plus[pos] ** gb[pos]
    92	    out[neg] = minus[neg] ** (-gb[neg])
    93	    return out
    94	
    95	
    96	def mat_covariance(universes):
    97	    """MAT production convention: universe-mean centered, biased 1/N."""
    98	    X = np.asarray(universes, dtype=float)
    99	    if X.ndim != 2 or X.shape[0] < 2:
   100	        raise ValueError("universes must have shape (N>=2, nbins)")
   101	    if not np.all(np.isfinite(X)):
   102	        raise ValueError("universes contain non-finite values")
   103	    Z = X - X.mean(axis=0, keepdims=True)
   104	    return (Z.T @ Z) / X.shape[0]
   105	
   106	
   107	def joint_throw_covariance(throws, cv):
   108	    """Mean-centered joint covariance plus the separately reported mean shift."""
   109	    X = np.asarray(throws, dtype=float)
   110	    cv = np.asarray(cv, dtype=float)
   111	    if X.ndim != 2 or X.shape[1:] != cv.shape:
   112	        raise ValueError(f"throws/CV shape mismatch: {X.shape} vs {cv.shape}")
   113	    if X.shape[0] < 2 or not np.all(np.isfinite(X)) or not np.all(np.isfinite(cv)):
   114	        raise ValueError("need at least two finite throws and a finite CV")
   115	    mean = X.mean(axis=0)
   116	    return mat_covariance(X), mean - cv

   119	def project_covariance(covariance, projection):
   120	    C = np.asarray(covariance, dtype=float)
   121	    M = np.asarray(projection, dtype=float)
   122	    if C.ndim != 2 or C.shape[0] != C.shape[1]:
   123	        raise ValueError("covariance must be square")
   124	    if M.ndim != 2 or M.shape[1] != C.shape[0]:
   125	        raise ValueError(f"projection/covariance shape mismatch: {M.shape}, {C.shape}")
   126	    if not np.all(np.isfinite(C)) or not np.all(np.isfinite(M)):
   127	        raise ValueError("projection inputs must be finite")
   128	    return M @ C @ M.T

Adopted covs `uq_5d/universe_stage2_5d_bkgaware/uq_universe_5d_covariance_combined_bkgaware{,_uthrow,_uthrow_cvcentered}.root`, **both PSD** (min-eig/max ~1e-16). **VERDICT: null-effect refinement (<0.3% everywhere)** — C_syst 4.345e-38→4.351e-38 (+0.14%), combined 4.345→4.358e-38 (+0.30%), adopted mean 5.80→5.81e-38, CV-centered 6.23→6.24e-38 — confirming the analysis is insensitive to the background-CV approximation. _Historical trace:_ C++ now writes per-universe background weights/kinematics and Python consumes them; banked sweeps fail closed unless those columns exist. Existing banks/products predate the fix, so it is inert until the 12-playlist dump-all rerun, merge, and re-bank complete. **UPDATE 2026-07-14 (traced verdict = GAP; the re-quote is NOT the throw-bank rebank):** the dump-all rerun + merge landed (`runEventLoopOmniFold_5D_MEFHC_universes_full_bkgaware.root`) and a bkgaware THROW-bank was built (`bank_uthrow_5d_bkgaware`, 374 files) — **but that bank comes from `unified_throw.py --dump`, which is SIGNAL-ONLY** (reads `mc_signal_reco` per-universe for `sig_<band>`; reads `mc_background` only in group 0 for the CV measured target), so it carries **zero** per-universe background columns and is bit-identical to `bank_uthrow_5d` for every consumed file. Consequently **NO currently-quoted covariance includes the per-universe background systematic** — background is still frozen at CV in all of them: GBDT unified-throw C_syst (`compare_unified_throw.py:115,120` pins `measured`/`measured_weights` to the CV bank; `unified_throw_cov.py:177-193` throws vary signal+flux only), PET C_syst (`pet_systematics_5d.py:203-218` varies only truth `rho`; background enters solely via the frozen bkgsub target), and the (E_avail,W) covariance (`eavailW_covariance.py:182,187` builds one CV `measured_weights` for all universes). The one mechanism that DOES rebuild a per-universe measured target from `w_bkg` is the **vertical sweep re-quote** — `sweep_bank_5d.py` do_run (`:177` banks `{tag}_bkgw.npy`, `:232-241` rebuilds `measured_weights` per universe, `:243-246` fail-closed unless `--allow-cv-background`) → `analyze_universes_5d.py:91-100` block-sum — plus the lateral direct-driver via `collect_bkg_nd(universe_branch=)` (`unfold_nd_omnifold_unbinned.py` ~:664). **These have NOT been run on the bkgaware inputs:** no `bank_sweep_5d`/`*_bkgw.npy` exist; `uq_5d/universe_sweep/` unfolds are dated 2026-06-28/29 (pre-fix); `sweep_bank_5d.py:39` still defaults to the non-bkgaware omnifile; RUN_LOG:1439 still lists "run the #13 covariance re-quote" as deferred. **To close:** `sweep_bank_5d.py --dump --omnifile ...bkgaware.root` → `--run` all vertical universes → `analyze_universes_5d.py` (+ lateral direct-driver on bkgaware), then compare sqrt-trace vs the CV-frozen covariance. NOTE: the **PET Phase-7 retraining-response is unaffected** (it consumes only signal truth ratios, bit-identical across banks — see `PET_UQ_PRODUCTION_STATUS.md` receipts); this gap is about C_syst-final/lateral, not Phase 7. | **RESOLVED 2026-07-14** (188-universe re-quote, both legs; <0.3% null-effect; all adopted covs PSD) | `nd-unfolding/CORRECTED_UQ_PRODUCTION_STATUS.md` (2026-07-14 B5' receipts + baseline-vs-bkgaware table); `nd-unfolding/ND_OMNIFOLD_RUN_LOG.md` (2026-07-03/04, 2026-07-12 entries); `nd-unfolding/PET_UQ_PRODUCTION_STATUS.md` (2026-07-14 CRITICAL FINDING) |

 if f:f.Close()

   100	def histnd(cols, w, edges):
   101	    """Weighted np.histogramdd over len(edges) axes -> (counts, sqrt(sumw2))."""
   102	    sample = np.column_stack(cols)
   103	    bins = [np.asarray(e, float) for e in edges]
   104	    counts, _ = np.histogramdd(sample, bins=bins, weights=w)
   105	    sumw2, _ = np.histogramdd(sample, bins=bins, weights=np.asarray(w) ** 2)
   106	    return counts, np.sqrt(sumw2)

   110	    """Write an N-D array as a flat TH1D (canonical) + a TH2D when N==2.
   111	
   112	    The flat TH1D (bin = C-order ravel index over `arr.shape`) is what the
   113	    covariance/chi2 tools consume; the full N-D structure is recovered by
   114	    reshaping with the known per-axis edges. (A THnSparseD was tried but its
   115	    Python binding segfaults at 4D on this ROOT build, so we keep the robust flat
   116	    form; the binning lives in the edges, recorded in the docs and the 1D/2D
   117	    projections written alongside.)
   118	    """
   119	    ndim = arr.ndim
   120	    flat = arr.ravel(order="C")
   121	    flat_err = None if err is None else err.ravel(order="C")
   122	    h1 = ROOT.TH1D(name + "_flat", title + ";global bin;value", flat.size, 0, flat.size)
   123	    h1.SetDirectory(0)
   124	    for i, v in enumerate(flat, start=1):
   125	        h1.SetBinContent(i, float(v))
   126	        if flat_err is not None:
   127	            h1.SetBinError(i, float(flat_err[i - 1]))
   128	    f_out.cd(); h1.Write()

BLOCK

The ten endpoint products themselves look usable, but commit `553a6a6` does not connect them to a genuinely fail-closed candidate-construction path.

Verified read-only positives:

- Exact inventory exists: five named bands × endpoints `{0,1}`. All ten ROOTs are clean, unrecovered, finite, 65,856-bin vectors, positive, and share the central 10,694-bin mask.
- Every asymmetric pair is genuinely different in all 10,694 reported cells. The pair-difference L2 norms range from `1.4781e-39` to `2.2588e-38`.
- All ten merged ROOTs are clean, have correct endpoint identity, finite positive POT, four nonempty trees, and exact `mc_signal_reco == mc_truth_denom == 32,849,103`.
- Beam-angle migration is demonstrably nonzero: X endpoints have reco entrants/exits `2731/2061` and `1936/2764`; Y has `2513/2294` and `2241/2567`.
- MAT biased-`1/N` mean centering is mathematically correct in [analyze_universes_5d.py](/pscratch/sd/j/josephrb/MINERvA-OmniFold/nd-unfolding/analyze_universes_5d.py:91) and [uq_math.py](/pscratch/sd/j/josephrb/MINERvA-OmniFold/nd-unfolding/uq_math.py:96):
  `C_b = ½Σ_e(x_be−x̄_b)(x_be−x̄_b)^T = ¼(x_b1−x_b0)(x_b1−x_b0)^T`.
- HEAD and `github/main` both equal `553a6a6`; the nine committed files are clean. No standard covariance candidate exists.
- Current independently computed hashes:
  - 5D central ROOT: `630306e20e4e175bde8b459174842a58e4f4b5a694b8a5018e730a952820aec8`
  - 5D mask/order: `74374b1af0795c3eb077c9ef0ee6ef3cfa4d7b7b3df63bd4f392d7db80eb136a` (`10694/65856`, C-order)
  - 4D central ROOT: `1fb8250820c00428fc547cb05aa95535023146723acdccb61f615f3fa763f9d2`
  - 4D mask/order: `c977c643d4017a3cc909f85e7f2725b4a96a0060a5b79b56294c231290039d25` (`4830/10976`)
  - Ten-endpoint manifest hash: `af568b4a2bb2f08e66e7a4380cb0c5b9af72a37ddec94a5b3297c2f50d999c54`
  - Declared config hash: `5efd31a4250a9084864e091ed6f8bd28ae81b029a747c3c2cd4e1fd5b6358917`

Ranked remaining defects:

1. **The authoritative P4 recipe still bypasses the repair.** It invokes `merge_active_endpoints.sh`, `run_active_lateral_unfolds_interactive.sh`, and the generic analyzer—not the new hardened runners or replacement builder—in [AGENT_A_HANDOFF.md](/pscratch/sd/j/josephrb/MINERvA-OmniFold/nd-unfolding/active_universe_5d/AGENT_A_HANDOFF.md:102). The old unfold launcher skips any nonempty output and never returns failure for an incomplete set at [run_active_lateral_unfolds_interactive.sh](/pscratch/sd/j/josephrb/MINERvA-OmniFold/nd-unfolding/run_active_lateral_unfolds_interactive.sh:25).

   Smallest fix: replace the durable recipe with one canonical driver using the repaired stages and exact receipts; retire or explicitly forbid the old standard path.

2. **Merged selection/migration evidence is not enforced or durable.** The new merge audit validates only four object names, does not assert `NMERGED==10`, ignores background-job failures, and then audits the 120 per-playlist files rather than the merged ROOTs: [run_p4_merge_audit_std.sh](/pscratch/sd/j/josephrb/MINERvA-OmniFold/nd-unfolding/run_p4_merge_audit_std.sh:13), [line 30](/pscratch/sd/j/josephrb/MINERvA-OmniFold/nd-unfolding/run_p4_merge_audit_std.sh:30), [line 34](/pscratch/sd/j/josephrb/MINERvA-OmniFold/nd-unfolding/run_p4_merge_audit_std.sh:34). The repaired manifest initializes `migration_abs=0` but never reads census parameters; `mig=0` is discarded at [p3s_manifest_summary.py](/pscratch/sd/j/josephrb/MINERvA-OmniFold/nd-unfolding/p3s_manifest_summary.py:76) and [line 127](/pscratch/sd/j/josephrb/MINERvA-OmniFold/nd-unfolding/p3s_manifest_summary.py:127). Worse, `--merged-dir` is parsed but entirely unused by [p4_validate_active_lateral.py](/pscratch/sd/j/josephrb/MINERvA-OmniFold/nd-unfolding/p4_validate_active_lateral.py:44).

   Smallest fix: add an exact ten-file merged audit producing committed JSON with clean/recovered status, identity, counts, POT, native misses and all four census values; require nonzero selection migration for BeamAngleX/Y and preserve expected zero selection counters for bin-migration-only bands.

3. **Atomic completion and parallel failure handling remain unsafe.** `valid_unfold` checks only clean-open plus key existence—not recovered state, finiteness, dimension, mask/order, config or receipt—at [run_p4_unfold_std.sh](/pscratch/sd/j/josephrb/MINERvA-OmniFold/nd-unfolding/run_p4_unfold_std.sh:22). Existing products are skipped without matching `.done` files at [line 29](/pscratch/sd/j/josephrb/MINERvA-OmniFold/nd-unfolding/run_p4_unfold_std.sh:29); none of the current ten products has a `.done`. ROOT is written directly to its final name, the failure branch ends successfully after `rm`, bare `wait` does not aggregate worker status, and final success uses only a broad count: [lines 34–42](/pscratch/sd/j/josephrb/MINERvA-OmniFold/nd-unfolding/run_p4_unfold_std.sh:34), [line 48](/pscratch/sd/j/josephrb/MINERvA-OmniFold/nd-unfolding/run_p4_unfold_std.sh:48).

   Smallest fix: write `OUT.tmp`, fully content-validate it, atomically rename ROOT and receipt, require matching root/config/source/merged hashes on resume, collect every PID status, and validate the exact tag set rather than a count.

4. **Inventory/config/mask hashing helpers are disconnected from production.** `P4Config.validate()` never checks `axes=="eavail,q3,W"` or `estimator=="lgbm"` at [p4_lib.py](/pscratch/sd/j/josephrb/MINERvA-OmniFold/nd-unfolding/p4_lib.py:49). Duplicate endpoint entries silently overwrite at [line 65](/pscratch/sd/j/josephrb/MINERvA-OmniFold/nd-unfolding/p4_lib.py:65). Neither `endpoint_manifest_hash`, `mask_order_hash`, nor `require_complete_unfold_set` is invoked by the launcher, analyzer, or validator. Bin edges/bin volumes and central ROOT hashes are never pinned.

   Smallest fix: make one committed manifest mandatory input to the analyzer, containing the exact ten SHA-256s, exact config, source blobs, merged fingerprints, central ROOT hash, five-axis edges/bin-volume hash, `10694/65856` mask hash and C-order declaration.

5. **Candidate construction/adoption provenance is not a connected pure-component chain.** The generic analyzer accepts arbitrary glob membership and silently skips a band with fewer than two endpoints at [analyze_universes_5d.py](/pscratch/sd/j/josephrb/MINERvA-OmniFold/nd-unfolding/analyze_universes_5d.py:73) and [line 93](/pscratch/sd/j/josephrb/MINERvA-OmniFold/nd-unfolding/analyze_universes_5d.py:93). The replacement builder ignores the active total, never verifies it equals the five active blocks, and performs unchecked subtraction/addition at [p4_lateral_replace.py](/pscratch/sd/j/josephrb/MINERvA-OmniFold/nd-unfolding/p4_lateral_replace.py:55) and [line 65](/pscratch/sd/j/josephrb/MINERvA-OmniFold/nd-unfolding/p4_lateral_replace.py:65). Its output lacks kept component identities and provenance. The handoff also compares against the superseded non-background-aware combined ROOT, while the corrected canonical family is identified in [ND_OMNIFOLD_STATUS.md](/pscratch/sd/j/josephrb/MINERvA-OmniFold/nd-unfolding/ND_OMNIFOLD_STATUS.md:20). Finally, `adopt_unified_5d.py` explicitly leaves lateral bands untouched at [adopt_unified_5d.py](/pscratch/sd/j/josephrb/MINERvA-OmniFold/nd-unfolding/adopt_unified_5d.py:17), so rerunning it cannot consume the new block.

   Smallest fix: reconstruct `C_final5` from explicitly named corrected background-aware pure components plus `Σ_b C_active,b`; require each active trace positive and bit-exact total equality, and make adoption explicitly consume that component manifest.

6. **Projection/nonmutation is not implemented as a gate.** The validator documents `--project` but defines no such argument or call. The standalone projection correctly constructs a width-weighted map, but central disagreement and PSD failure are only printed before output is always written: [project_cov_nd.py](/pscratch/sd/j/josephrb/MINERvA-OmniFold/nd-unfolding/project_cov_nd.py:167), [line 191](/pscratch/sd/j/josephrb/MINERvA-OmniFold/nd-unfolding/project_cov_nd.py:191), [line 195](/pscratch/sd/j/josephrb/MINERvA-OmniFold/nd-unfolding/project_cov_nd.py:195). The helper’s 3% vector comparison is not file nonmutation and is unused at [p4_lib.py](/pscratch/sd/j/josephrb/MINERvA-OmniFold/nd-unfolding/p4_lib.py:195).

   Smallest fix: gate `C4=M C5 Mᵀ` with exact `10694→4830` mask/order/edge hashes, finite/symmetry `≤1e-9`, PSD `λmin≥−1e-12|λmax|`, mandatory central-reproduction threshold, and byte-identical pre/post hashes of both frozen central ROOTs.

7. **The 16 tests are helper tests, not launch-path negative tests.** The suite is explicitly ROOT-free and imports only `p4_lib` at [test_p4_repair.py](/pscratch/sd/j/josephrb/MINERvA-OmniFold/nd-unfolding/tests/test_p4_repair.py:7). “Truncated output” merely removes a string from an in-memory set; merged tests use fabricated dictionaries; projection uses tiny arrays. No test invokes either shell driver, the analyzer, validator, or replacement builder.

   Missing tests: stale ROOT without receipt; recovered/NaN/wrong-dimension ROOT; worker failure among ten parallel tasks; duplicate/extra/wrong endpoint; bad axes/estimator/weights; missing or zero migration census; active-total/component mismatch; wrong canonical support hash; adopted-path alias/symlink overwrite; bad projection/PSD/central hash. Each must assert nonzero exit and no final product.

Commit durability also remains incomplete: the current `p3s_standard_manifest.json` is not tracked and records `source_commit=3b5945b…`, while the repository commit gate requires result summaries and receipts to land with the result [AGENTS.md](/pscratch/sd/j/josephrb/MINERvA-OmniFold/AGENTS.md:40). The repair code is pushed; the endpoint/merged/unfold evidence is not yet durable.

This does not authorize candidate construction, corrected-5D adoption, or 4D projection.
